q: I won 4 Ballon d'Or awards in a row from 2009 to 2012. Who am I?
This French striker scored a hat-trick in the 2022 World Cup final but still finished on the losing side. Name him.
He scored 91 goals in a single calendar year in 2012, breaking Gerd Muller's record. Who was he?
This club has won the most La Liga titles in history. Name them.
Called 'The Black Panther', this striker was the Ballon d'Or winner in 1995. Name him.
This manager won the Champions League three consecutive times with Real Madrid from 2016 to 2018. Who was he?
I played for Barcelona, PSG, and Inter Miami during my career. Who am I?
This Brazilian is the all-time leading scorer in men's international football with 77 goals in official FIFA matches. Name him.
Called 'The Phenomenon', this Brazilian striker won two World Cups and two Ballon d'Or awards. Name him.
This English club became the first to win the treble of Premier League, FA Cup, and Champions League in 1999. Name them.
I scored the 'Hand of God' goal and the 'Goal of the Century' in the same 1986 World Cup match against England. Who am I?

I am the all-time top scorer in Champions League history. Who am I?
